exampleSentencesTranslated: Yesterday I watched a terrible movie at night.
The heavy rain made the traffic this morning terrible.
I felt terrible when I lost all the data on my computer.
exampleSentences: Hôm qua em xem một bộ phim kinh khủng vào ban đêm.
Trời mưa to làm giao thông sáng nay kinh khủng quá.
Anh cảm thấy kinh khủng khi bị mất hết dữ liệu trong máy tính.

content.sentence: Bộ phim này thật sự rất ___.

notes:
Kinh khủng means terrible, horrible, awful. It describes something very bad, shocking, or extreme.

It’s an adjective, used after nouns to describe situations, feelings, sounds, smells, etc. It can also act as a strong intensifier, meaning “extremely” — sometimes even for positive things.

Very close synonym: khủng khiếp (often interchangeable, slightly more dramatic).

definitions.es: Causando miedo o temor; extremadamente malo o desagradable.
definitions.en: Causing fear or dread; extremely bad or unpleasant.
definitions.vi: Gây ra sự sợ hãi hoặc lo lắng; cực kỳ tồi tệ hoặc khó chịu.

example.vi: Cảm giác này thật kinh khủng.

notes_md:
**Kinh khủng** means *terrible, horrible, awful*. It describes something very bad, shocking, or extreme.

It’s an **adjective**, used after nouns to describe situations, feelings, sounds, smells, etc. It can also act as a **strong intensifier**, meaning “extremely” — sometimes even for positive things.


Very close synonym: **khủng khiếp** (often interchangeable, slightly more dramatic).
